Who I am

Your finance partner,
not just a bookkeeper.

Hi, I'm Olena – an independent accounting and FP&A consultant working with small and mid-size companies across the US. I help business owners get clean, reliable financials they can actually use to run and grow their business.

My clients get more than a bookkeeper. They get a finance partner who understands the full picture – from daily transactions to strategic forecasting – and who speaks both accounting and business language fluently.

With 15 years across Vodafone, Samsung, and earlier accounting & finance roles, I bring the kind of financial discipline and cross-functional instincts that most small businesses never get access to. I'm a Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor – and genuinely excited about AI-native accounting. I'm actively deploying these tools and love helping forward-thinking clients be among the first to benefit.

"I work best with businesses that are growing, in transition, or dealing with financial chaos they're tired of living with. If your books are messy, your process is broken, or you're ready to modernize your finance stack – that's exactly where I come in."

My story

01

First steps in accounting — Kyiv, 2009

I graduated right into the 2008 financial crisis. My Ernst & Young internship was cancelled, but I landed at Darnytsia – one of Ukraine's oldest pharmaceutical companies. Day-one reality: GL postings, bank recs, FX, month-end close. The lesson that stuck wasn't the accounting – it was the discipline. Clear processes, cross-team coordination, work ethics. I was learning what separates companies that scale from ones that stall.

02

The accounting backbone of non-financial teams

Early in my career I worked embedded in Sales, Marketing, and Operations teams – not in a finance department. That changed everything. I learned that finance lives in every deal, every campaign, every hiring decision. To be useful, you have to speak the language of the people making those calls. That's a skill most accountants don't have. I do.

03

Vodafone – data becomes a story

Six years in telecom – from operations to business analysis to FP&A – taught me how recurring revenue, churn, and retention economics work at scale, long before SaaS made those concepts famous. I built budgets, forecasts, quarterly benchmarks, and countless reports and presentations. I learned that the real job of finance is storytelling: translating numbers into decisions people actually act on.

04

Samsung & United States, 2022

At Samsung I saw what world-class financial discipline looks like across a global subsidiary network. Then, when Russia invaded Ukraine in 2022, I relocated to United States and started fresh. I got certified as a QuickBooks ProAdvisor and launched HMCS – because US small businesses deserve the same financial clarity that Fortune 500 companies take for granted.

What I do

Recurring bookkeeping

Weekly, monthly, or quarterly – clean books, reconciled accounts, and financial reports delivered on schedule. Every business has unique complexities, and I'll build a customized plan that works for you. Fixed price, no surprises.

Fractional FP&A

Budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and KPI dashboards – CFO-level insight without the full-time hire. If your business needs to better understand its efficiency and plan its financials, I can help on a fractional basis.

QuickBooks cleanup

Months or years of bookkeeping left undone? I untangle it fast, fixed-price, and audit-ready. Perfect before tax filing, audits, or year-end reporting. I eliminate manual entry to reduce your costs dramatically.

Process repair & AI transition

Broken workflows, chaotic closes, or adopting AI-native tools – I identify bottlenecks, fix the logic, and build a smoother stack. Especially valuable for businesses in transition, reorganization, or early AI adoption.

If your books are messy, your process is broken, or you're ready to modernize – let's talk.
